sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for material code AMI02-01167A, TAPE CONDUCTIVE-E2X_TOP_CARBON_ADHESIVE, for model 2G DETECTOR from K-WON Corporation.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents part approval details, specification checks, EC history, checklist items, and substance restriction requirements for the conductive tape part.
